Name: .NET 8 Desktop Runtime (Required)
ToolTip: REQUIRED to start the app. Download and install the .NET Desktop Runtime 8.0 (Windows x64). Without it the application will not launch.

Name: Visual C++ Redistributable
ToolTip: Install Visual C++ Redistributable 2015-2022 (both x64 and x86). Needed by the native OpenCV and OCR (Tesseract) libraries.

Name: WebView2 Runtime
ToolTip: Required by the embedded browser. Already present on Windows 11 and most updated Windows 10 systems; install the Evergreen Runtime only if missing.
